_comment: Engineering Storybook + drift-test reference fixture for SignalCard / SignalGroup variants. Mirrors the doc-02 §8 canonical 11-signal registry (was the iter-3 13-signal placeholder taxonomy; aligned 2026-05-29 per D1). Signal states are MIXED varied across the file to give Storybook coverage of ACTIVE / INACTIVE / STALE / UNAVAILABLE / ERROR rendering — this is NOT a live snapshot. For live editorial state see apps/web/data/market/signals.json.

summary.pt-BR: A estrutura do Bitcoin continua favorável.
summary.es: La estructura de Bitcoin se mantiene favorable.

title.es: BTC por encima de la EMA de 20 meses

summary.en: Monthly close above the 20-month EMA — intermediate-term structure supportive.

summary.de: Monatsschluss über der 20-Monats-EMA — mittelfristige Struktur stützend.

summary.de: Monatlicher Stoch-RSI %K unter der 10-Schwelle — kurzfristiges Momentum hat sich nicht aus der Überverkauft-Zone gelöst.
